properties.name: AutoUpdateCommandHelp
properties.summary: Gets or sets the command help dialog auto-update feature.

properties.name: ContextMenuDelay
properties.summary: Gets or sets the time to wait before permitting context menu display.

properties.name: EnableContextMenu
properties.summary: true if right mouse down + delay will pop up context menu on a mouse up if no move happens.

properties.name: MaximumPopupMenuLines
properties.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of popup menu lines.

properties.name: MaximumUndoMemoryMb
properties.summary: Gets or sets the minimum undo memory Mb. Undo records will be purged if there are more than MinimumUndoSteps and they use more than MaximumUndoMemoryMb.

properties.name: MiddleMouseMacro
properties.summary: Gets or sets the toolbar to popup when the middle mouse is clicked on a view, this value is only used when MiddleMouseMode is set to PopupToolbar.

properties.name: MiddleMouseMode
properties.summary: Gets or sets what happens when the user clicks the middle mouse.

properties.name: MiddleMousePopupToolbar
properties.summary: Gets or sets the toolbar to popup when the middle mouse is clicked on a view, this value is only used when MiddleMouseMode is set to PopupToolbar.

properties.name: MinimumUndoSteps
properties.summary: Gets or sets the minimum undo steps. Undo records will be purged if there are more than MinimumUndoSteps and they use more than MaximumUndoMemoryMb.

properties.name: MouseSelectMode
properties.summary: Gets or sets the current selection mode.

properties.name: NewObjectIsoparmCount
properties.summary: Gets or sets the number of isoparm curves to show on new objects.
